headline: Helm
description: Helm (Deis, 2015, graduated CNCF) is the Kubernetes package manager — 'apt/yum for K8s'. Charts package Kubernetes resources (Deployments, Services, ConfigMaps) with templating (Go templates) and values. Helm 3 (2019) removed Tiller (server component) for improved security.

citation.name: Helm: The Kubernetes Package Manager (2025 Edition)
citation.author: multiple

citation.name: Kubernetes Application Management: Helm, Kustomize, and GitOps (2025)
citation.author: multiple
